title: MiniHUD Moon Translation Fix
description: Fixed the "Format error:" when using the {MOON} placeholder in MiniHUD's dateFormatMinecraft option in Simplified Chinese.
body:
English
---
This Resource Pack does one simple thing: Fix an issue where the ```Format error:``` message appeared when using the ```{MOON}``` placeholder in the ```dateFormatMinecraft``` option of MiniHUD in the Simplified Chinese translation.

简体中文
---
这个资源包只做一件事：修复了使用简体中文时在 MiniHUD 的 ```dateFormatMinecraft``` 选项中使用 ```{MOON}``` 占位符时出现 ```Format error:``` 的问题。
